channel.title: Posts on Sukalaper - Home
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Sukalaper - Home

item.title: Getting Started With Cupper
item.description: Original repo is no longer maintained. It’s archived and read-only. Fork available here. Cupper An accessibility-friendly Hugo theme, ported from the original Cupper project. Table of contents Demo Minimum Hugo version Installation Updating Run example site Configuration Nav Title or Logo Favicons Shortcodes Syntax highlighting Enable Table of Contents for a Blog Post Localization Custom CSS and JS Default to Dark Theme Enable utterances Non-Git Repo Getting help Credits Demo You’re watching it here~
